google.summary: Webhook for Google Calendar API Push Notifications
google.response_description: Response confirming receipt of Google Calendar notification.
google.description:
This endpoint receives push notifications from Google Calendar API.
Requires request validation (e.g., checking `X-Goog-Channel-Token`, `X-Goog-Resource-State`).
google.summary_v2: Webhook for Google Calendar API Push Notifications
google.description_v2:
Accepts notifications from Google Calendar API (Push Notifications).
Requires request validation (e.g., checking `X-Goog-Channel-Token`, `X-Goog-Resource-State`).

outlook.summary: Webhook for Outlook Calendar API (Microsoft Graph)
outlook.response_description: Response confirming receipt of Microsoft Graph notification.
outlook.description:
This endpoint receives notifications from Microsoft Graph API
for subscriptions to Outlook calendar changes.
Requires `clientState` validation in notifications if used.
outlook.summary_v2: Webhook for Outlook Calendar API (Microsoft Graph)
outlook.description_v2:
Accepts notifications from Outlook Calendar API via Microsoft Graph Webhooks.
Handles validation requests (`validationToken`) and change notifications.
Requires `clientState` validation in notifications if used.
outlook.status_error_processing_accepted: Error processing Outlook Calendar notification, but request accepted.
outlook.status_received_processing: Outlook Calendar notification received and taken into processing.

errors.outlook_json_parse_or_no_token: Failed to parse JSON request body or missing validationToken.

telegram.description_v2:
Accepts updates from Telegram Bot API.
Security is usually ensured via a secret token appended to the webhook URL
during its registration with Telegram. This endpoint should verify this token if used.
telegram.response_message_stub: Telegram webhook received and queued for processing (stub).
telegram.status_processing_error_accepted: Error processing Telegram update, but request accepted.

viber.description_v2:
Accepts callbacks from Viber Bot API.
Requires request validation using `X-Viber-Content-Signature` header.
viber.response_message_stub_validation_needed: Viber webhook received (stub, signature validation needed!).

slack.summary_v2: Webhook for Slack (Events API, Interactive Components)
slack.description_v2:
Accepts events from Slack Events API or requests from Interactive Components.
Requires request validation using `X-Slack-Signature` and `X-Slack-Request-Timestamp`.
slack.response_message_stub_validation_needed: Slack webhook received (stub, signature validation needed!).

teams.description_v2:
Accepts messages and events for a Microsoft Teams bot via Bot Framework.
Requires JWT token validation in `Authorization` header.
teams.response_message_stub_validation_needed: Teams webhook received (stub, token validation needed!).
teams.status_processing_error_accepted: Error processing Teams activity, but request accepted.
teams.status_activity_received_processing: Teams activity received and being processed.

generic.description:
Accepts webhooks from unspecified external services.
    **WARNING: This endpoint is conceptual (a stub) and does not implement any security mechanisms
    (signature validation, tokens, etc.) by default. Do not use in production without proper validation!**
    It only logs received data. Future implementation may include logic for routing to appropriate handlers based on headers or request body.
